name: swarmpath-agent-bridge
description: SwarmPath Agent Bridge: Claude Agent SDK → SSE → Web Frontend (with Evolution Engine + Knowledge Base)

scripts.build:sidecar: npm run build && bun build --compile dist/index.js --outfile src-tauri/binaries/swarmpath-server-aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:sdk-assets: mkdir -p src-tauri/sdk-assets && cp -r node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk/cli.js src-tauri/sdk-assets/ && test -d node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk/vendor && cp -r node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk/vendor src-tauri/sdk-assets/ || true
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run build:sidecar && npm run build:sdk-assets && npx tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build:sidecar && npm run build:sdk-assets && npx tauri build
